review_title: We love Asset Panda!
description: Overall, it’s been a fantastic experience for myself and my team. Once you get past the initial learning stage, it’s great!
author: Aifton C.
pros: Highly customizable for different teams. My team and I love being to fields, workflows, and reports.
cons: There are occasional glitches and there tends to be a learning curve due to how many things the software is capable of.

review_title: Great asset tracking!
description: We really enjoyed using this software but ended up switching since assett tracking was included in another software package we had.
author: tyler G.
pros: Great tool and super easy to manage. Simple setup. Low stress high utility. an easy way to see all assets at a glance.
cons: The cost. WE ended up discontinuing use because asset tracking was included with another SAAS tool we use.

review_title: Good to track the crazy stuff we have
description: Asset panda allows me to track where the projectors are going to and the expense associated with them. We no longer lose the expensive laptops that go out on the field which is a huge relief. I can now see at a glance which employees have possession of the projectors as opposed to having to send 10 e-mails to non-responsive individuals. It tracks all maintenance records in one place; therefore the trucks will not break down on the side of the road during a job.
author: Rishi G.
pros: The dashboard is fairly well organized. I do not get headaches trying to find the checkout button and I am also impressed that the custom fields function with our unique lab equipment (without crashing). The asset panda software manages the multiple accounts for our company's various branches across three states. Good enough. I like the fact that the mobile app will scan the barcodes (even when I am in a rush) and the warehouse lighting is flickering. I am happy that the api did not take down the entire server when we added it.
cons: The search bar in asset panda is almost completely useless unless you know exactly what the name of the cable is that you are searching for and will not provide related searches. My largest complaint is that previous reservations stay in the system indefinitely and you have to individually select delete each time which is an absolute nightmare.

review_title: Simple platform at a great cost.
description: For the price Asset Panda is a great asset management system. It's easily customizable and simple to use. You can export and import assets with ease and run end of year reports no problem.
author: Aaron D.
pros: It is a great way to manage all of our IT Assets in one place making sure ownership, condition, and versions stay documented and up to date.
cons: There is a lending library feature that is not very functional which I have tried to work with support to do, but there is way too many steps for such an obvious and simple feature. We want our employees to be able to easily check out devices without clicking 20 buttons.

review_title: Work with the leading in class of asset management, Asset Panda is a gem.
description: A five star experience worth all the time and money. Give it a shot. Don't be late.
author: Emmanuel D.
pros: I absolutely love it's ease of use and it's flexibility is on another level. How I wish I had started using a bit earlier. It makes adding data more easier into my assets. I also love it's customizations option. A software like no other.
cons: I can't even think of any cons. It's so satisfying how Asset Panda works.

review_title: Asset Panda is a proper solution for asset lifecycle management
author: Mehmed Oğuz Ş.
pros: Asset Panda makes asset life cycle management quite easy with its excellent inteface.
cons: Asset Panda can inprove its services in asset tracing side.

review_title: Cheap but highly customizable
description: Their support was great whenever I ran into an issue. This is a very bare bones inventory product but it does everything you should need for a great price.
author: Joel D.
pros: Very cost effective and highly customizable. It includes barcodes and the app on a phone can scan them.
cons: While very customizable, there is a long initial setup process. Once that's done, it just works. I used this a couple years ago so they may have added features since then.

review_title: Asset panda gave us the right control over heavy equipment tracking.
description: We reduced lost gear and unscheduled down time. The system let us see underleveraged assets and rotate inventory better, and that translated into less over purchasing and tighter ops control.
author: Moath A.
pros: Asset Panda is our source for tracking construction equipment on various job sites. Field team check-in/check-out was quick with the mobile app with barcode scanning, and asset history is easily audited.
cons: It was time consuming to set up initially we had to bulk upload and customise fields to suit our rental model. It might not be as user-friendly for less tech-savvy staff when it comes to reporting.

review_title: Custom visibility of assets according to my requisites
description: Asset Panda is an efficient and scalable platform to manage assets across multiple location but the search capabilities of old records can be enhanced with regard to the reliability of filtering.
author: Joe Y.
pros: Having on-boarded teams in two different locations, I experienced the ability of Asset Panda to expand to large offices and multi-site fleets. Such easier compliance was due to signature checkouts and maintenance logs.
cons: My experience was also rather unpleasant when trying to find older assets and filters sometimes broke down.

review_title: Honest review
author: Sim K.
pros: It is very easy to use and non technical people can use it with minimal training and you can customize it
cons: Sometimes there is a lagg in screens which makes it frustrating and lacks the functionality and slows the performance
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the most User Friendly applications around.
description: The best word for me to describe our Asset Panda experience is Easy. From setup to support I have found the everyone in the company to be very helpful, knowledgeable and responsive.
author: Kerri B.
pros: I love the ease of use. It is very user friendly. If I have any questions, the chat feature is a wonderful way to get help.
cons: The only problems I have had is my own lack of knowledge. But a quick chat session later and all is well.

review_title: Asset Panda has allowed us to centralize and track all IT assets
description: The college has had a great experience with AP since we started using it, it has allowed my team to manage and track inventory of all IT assets that we hand out to our employees. It provides reporting that assists with our yearly refresh of laptops.
author: Alvin S.
pros: GUI interface ease of use, accessible across multiple locations as it is web-based. Easy to maintain and update assets and customize fields.
cons: We do not have any cons with the product, we find it to suit our environment and needs perfectly.

review_title: Usefull and User-friendly
author: Federico T.
pros: Asset Panda is a useful tool for tracking and managing assets. I like that I can create custom fields and generate reports
cons: Could have more customization options and better integrations with other tools.

review_title: Highly Customizable and Efficient Asset Management Tool
description: My overall experience with Asset Panda has been very positive. The platform is easy to use, incredibly flexible, and highly efficient in managing assets. While the pricing and learning curve might be drawbacks for some, the level of control, customization, and mobile functionality it offers more than makes up for it. Asset Panda has streamlined our asset management process and improved accountability, making it a valuable tool for our business.
author: Aruna R.
pros: The best part about Asset Panda is its customization capabilities. The platform allows you to tailor workflows, fields, and asset data to fit your specific business needs, making it highly adaptable to various industries. I also loved the mobile app's functionality, especially the barcode scanning and asset check-in/check-out features, which make managing assets on the go incredibly easy and efficient. Its reporting tools are also top-notch, providing detailed insights into asset performance and lifecycle management.
cons: The pricing model is based on the number of assets rather than users, which can get costly for businesses that need to track many assets. Additionally, the learning curve for advanced features like API integrations or custom workflows can be steep, requiring some technical know-how. Finally, offline access for the mobile app is limited, which can be a challenge in areas with poor connectivity.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: a office mess + Asset Panda = a structurally, organized department
description: Our IT department was a mess, with Asset Panda we are able to quickly find out what items are tied to who.
author: Cooper D.
pros: That all of our things are organized in one spot!
cons: Having to type each individual item in but after that it's good to go!

review_title: Asset Panda has been super helpful in keeping track of our company's equipment and managing maintenance schedules.
author: Ana Z.
pros: The mobile app is convenient for updating asset information on the go, and the customizable fields make it easy to tailor the software to our specific needs.
cons: The user interface can be a bit overwhelming at first, and it took some time to get used to the navigation and layout of the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Asset Panda solved the impossible.
description: We had an incredibly diverse inventory. Fields for one asset didn't necessary make sense for many other assets, which just about every inventory solution we slogged through demos trying out couldn't handle. At first I found their 10 table (group) limit rather restrictive, but once I figured out how I could leverage their system into a functional schema, it was as incredibly robust as if I'd built the database myself - and fast for a cloud solution. Now I don't need to spend unthinkable amounts of time building a LAMP solution from the ground up, or paying someone to do it for us, and all without hardware to worry about either. It's an expensive solution, but it will guarantee a worthwhile ROI when you do the math and realize the costs of creating a solution as powerful as they have yourself. And you get the Apps too!
author: James G.
pros: We had control over our basic database schema from the beginning. Asset Panda looks and feels like a turn-key inventory solution to our users, but we designed and built how it works for our own custom and niche needs, without a developer and without expensive licensing and hardware. If you factor in those costs to achieve the same control and quality that Asset Panda achieved out of the box, it easily pays for itself.
cons: Some of the features built for everyone are forced on everyone. Session timeouts that are way too fast have been a problem. If it times out while viewing a report, it will take you back into that report with no way out instead of just taking you to your default list view. More complex searching in the List View is lacking right now. You can get complex with reports, but you can't run actions on reports' results. The good news is they've been very receptive and responsive to feedback. Not once have they said "this is how it works and we don't plan on changing it." which is refreshing. Most of our feedback is submitted for future feature requests.
author_profession: Tech III - School of the Arts

review_title: Excellent Asset Management Tool
description: Overall, it has been a great initial year with the subscription and we are signing up for a longer term commitment. It continues to grow as a tool for our company and have been pleasantly surprised at the capabilities and support Asset Panda has exhibited.
author: David H.
pros: Being a small/mid-sized business we have struggled to keep track of fixed assets along with operational assets. We have been unable to accumulate data and with Asset Panda's help it provided an affordable platform to begin transitioning to a more modernized and sophisticated way of management. Having an unlimited number of users was one of the key factors along with an effective application that could be leveraged on mobile devices. We continue to identify more ways to leverage this platform and feel like we get a lot of value for what we pay. The support team and onboarding group was and is very impressive and always get prompt and timely responses to help resolve a situation or question.
cons: There can be some short comings on the reporting and wish it had a little more sophistication in the fixed asset accounting aspect but that is something we have been able to work around. No major complaints except we sometimes run across some configuration limitations but overall the framework is flexible for any and all industries that you can usually manage it and work around to a resolution.

review_title: one of the best ASSET TRACKING tool
description: My overall experience with app/software/SAAS can be summed in the follwing points: A. The given app/software/SAAS has been solving the following business problems : - inventory storage - solved wasteful write-off of assets - provides detailed lsit of assets assigned to the user - aids in hardware refresh - provides straight line depreciation B. i have been able to realize the following benefits with the help of the given app/software/SAAS : - ability to put serial number on all equipments - saved lot of money by asset tracking - put all assets in its place - allows to get back assets from users leaving the country - adding of multiple categories.
author: Khalid A.
pros: i found the following features as most impactful: - asset tracking -asset organisation - asset location finding using GPS - anywhere tracking based on cloud. - assets marked using e-signature Yes the product is quite easy to use for: - cloud based application - mobile based asset tracking - uploading pictures, documents and quotes of an asset - tracking and adding of non-depreciable assets - Yes i was successfully able to implement the integration of the app/software/SAAS with my existing business processes quite smoothly and easily as i could set it up with a little self-help, effort, and online training guides..
cons: I found the following features that were either missing or could be improved: - search function could be improved - confusing security sign in - configuration of images - mobile bar-coded scanner I found the following features or aspects of the product that are difficult to use: - impossible to know double posting of assets - difficult to setup users - organisation of images gets difficult - problematic setup of SSO - time-out settings No, the integration of the app/software/SAAS with my existing business processes not so much difficult as i could set it up with a little self-help, effort, and online training guides.

review_title: Keep track of everything!
description: Overall, this is an excellent piece of software, and I highly recommend it to anyone needing an easy but effective way to manage their assets
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Asset panda is excellent and keeping track of all your IT assets are making sure everything is where it should be and you know when stuff is Jake
cons: The free limits the number of assets you can have, and then you have to go onto a paid plan, which can get quite expensive

review_title: Great product and a great support team
description: It has been great. Every person I have corresponded with has been helpful and nice.
author: Tyler K.
pros: There are multiple things I love about Asset Panda. 1. Ease of uploading new assets 2. Ease of creating and running specific reports 3. Ease of searching a user and seeing every asset assigned to them 4. Ease of moving an employee and having all of their assets get reassigned to their new location
cons: Although it is a good feature and I know we will eventually use it appropriately, my team and I have really struggled to get the Reservation Portal up and running to fit our particular business needs. With the help of [SENSITIVE CONTENT] in support, she quickly pointed out to me that I was missing one particular step. Once we fixed that step we have been in a pilot phase. I believe within the next few months we will move completely over to using the reservation portal. Thanks [SENSITIVE CONTENT]

review_title: Great for School IT Tracking and integrating with Google
author: Robert C.
pros: The integration with Google is great because it allows all of our students to have their own login which we use for submitting Chromebook Repair Work Orders. The ability to automatically generate notifications to administrators when the Work Order is submitted is nice. It was fairly easy to integrate with our existing processes.
cons: The mobile app only shows 3 Asset fields on the main screen. It's sometimes hard to search for and find an asset because you can't see all the fields on the main screen.

review_title: Solid flexible choice
description: We get a lot of use from the data that we have in the system. We like having access to the data in the phone app, and using the barcode scan options save time. It's been a great decision to move forward with this tool, and it continues to improve and do more for us.
author: Michael A.
pros: This software is highly customizable, and has grown increasingly more robust over the last couple of years. It was easy for us to import all our old data and get started. We use it to track computer assets and inventory, and we have been able to tweak the setup to make it work better for us over the last 3 years as we learn more about what it can do, and what we need from the software.
cons: There are some times in the screens were you can accidentally make changes to your whole inventory, rather than just a few items, and it's not really clear that would happen. They are working to improve that process, but that's been our biggest problem.

review_title: My preferred choice for asset tracking and management software
author: Kristian G.
pros: Customizable: Asset Panda allows users to customize the software to meet their specific needs. This includes custom fields, labels, and workflows. This makes it a great tool for organizations with unique asset management requirements.Mobile App: Asset Panda offers a mobile app that allows users to manage their assets on-the-go. This is especially useful for organizations with mobile teams or employees who need to access asset information in the field.User-Friendly: Asset Panda has a user-friendly interface that makes it easy for users to navigate and use the software. This can save time and reduce the need for extensive training.Automated Tracking: Asset Panda automates asset tracking, making it easy to keep track of asset location, maintenance schedules, and other important information. This can save time and reduce errors associated with manual tracking.Integrations: Asset Panda integrates with a variety of other software, including accounting software, help desk software, and purchasing systems. This can streamline asset management workflows and improve overall efficiency.
cons: Customizable: Asset Panda allows users to customize the software to meet their specific needs. This includes custom fields, labels, and workflows. author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Asset Panda
description: As mentioned before, being able to keep track of our vehicles and assets (equipment, electronics) etc has been beneficial.
author: Debbie D.
pros: Reserving, checking in/out of vehicles and assets. As long as our staff remembers to use these features it's a good way to know what is available and what is not and keeping track of them. For most people it would probably be an easy software to learn, but I am not computer saavy so it was challenging for me, however I understand the basics which works fine.
cons: I think there should be some default settings so that the set up/transition is easier. Being able to speak to a live person on the spot for help is sometimes more helpful that online chat.
